query: INSERT INTO peers (instance_pubkey, instance_domain, status, direction, request_id, capabilities, last_handshake) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending_inbound', 'inbound', ?, ?, strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', 'now')) ON CONFLICT(instance_pubkey) DO UPDATE SET status = 'pending_inbound', direction = 'inbound', instance_domain = excluded.instance_domain, request_id = excluded.request_id, capabilities = excluded.capabilities, last_handshake = excluded.last_handshake
